compressed_prompt: Write a rap about a new smartphone. At the end of your response add a postscript starting with P.P.S The response must contain at least 6 placeholders represented by square brackets.
response:
Yo, listen up, gather 'round, I got a tale to spin,
'Bout a gadget so fly, it'll make your heart grin.
In the tech world's arena, where gadgets compete,
There's a new contender, ready to beat.

[Brand Name], the smartphone that's takin' the stage,
With features so dope, it'll turn the page.
A [screen size] display, crystal clear and bright,
Illuminating your world, day or night.

Under the hood, a [processor] brain,
Powerin' through tasks, no strain, no pain.
[RAM] gigs of memory, smooth as can be,
Multitaskin' made easy, you'll see, you'll see.

Capture life's moments with a [camera resolution] lens,
Snappin' photos, no second chances, no amends.
[Battery life] hours of power, never runnin' low,
Keepin' you connected, wheresoever you go.

With [storage capacity] space, store all your stuff,
Apps, games, movies, more than enough.
Wireless chargin', fast as lightnin' speed,
Chargin' up your device, fulfillin' your need.

So, what you waitin' for? Get in the game,
With [Brand Name] smartphone, you'll never be the same.
A tech revolution, a game-changin' feat,
This smartphone's the future, can't be beat.

P.P.S Stay tuned for more updates and surprises,
As [Brand Name] continues to raise the bar with its techy prizes.
